This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] gatherND float32 3D input and 2D indices
  assert_less_than_equal: assert_array_approx_equals_ulp: test gatherND float32 actual -66.05901336669922 should be close enough to expected 90.2870101928711 by ULP distance: expected a number less than or equal to 0n but got 2235085098n

  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "NotSupportedError: Failed to execute 'build' on 'MLGraphBuilder': TFLite doesn't support to gather input into one dimension."
